title: Oil prices plunge on report U.S. and Iran closing in on a deal to end war; Brent falls below $100
summary_full: Oil prices fell sharply after Axios reported that the U.S. and Iran were closing in on an agreement to bring an end to the conflict.
summary_public: Oil prices fell sharply after Axios reported that the U.S. and Iran were closing in on an agreement to bring an end to the conflict.

IR.label: neutral
IR.evidence: Oil prices fell sharply after Axios reported that the U.S. and Iran were closing in on an agreement
